message:
Welcome back again! 👋

To quickly catch you up: we've completed **Stages 1–5** of the MSPM33C321A derivative MCU flow — all specs, RTL generation, testbench verification (21/21 pass), and a clean **PROCEED_TO_PNR** verdict are done. We then kicked off **Stage 6 (Physical Design)** and got through synthesis, floorplan, PDN, placement, and global routing successfully, but the Detailed Routing (DRT) process was interrupted when the session restarted and will need to be resumed.

Would you like to **continue with Stage 6 and re-launch the PnR/DRT** to finish the physical design and produce the final GDS? Or is there something else you'd like to focus on — such as reviewing the intermediate artifacts (spec, memory map, verification results, dashboard) that are already complete?

args.content:
Welcome back again! 👋

To quickly catch you up: we've completed **Stages 1–5** of the MSPM33C321A derivative MCU flow — all specs, RTL generation, testbench verification (21/21 pass), and a clean **PROCEED_TO_PNR** verdict are done. We then kicked off **Stage 6 (Physical Design)** and got through synthesis, floorplan, PDN, placement, and global routing successfully, but the Detailed Routing (DRT) process was interrupted when the session restarted and will need to be resumed.

Would you like to **continue with Stage 6 and re-launch the PnR/DRT** to finish the physical design and produce the final GDS? Or is there something else you'd like to focus on — such as reviewing the intermediate artifacts (spec, memory map, verification results, dashboard) that are already complete?
